title: dactylis littoralis
intro: Dactylis littoralis, also known as coastal bentgrass or sea bent, is a type of grass that grows in coastal areas and is native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dactylis littoralis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Dactylis littoralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
